'''鈭歾h-t-zh-j''' ('''kazhatzhejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zipwire|zipwire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zipwire|zipwire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-t-zh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazhatzhejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhatzhejoko|thizhatzhejoko]] || [[word:jizhatzhejoko|jizhatzhejoko]] || [[word:shizhatzhejoko|shizhatzhejoko]] || [[word:kizhatzhejoko|kizhatzhejoko]]
